ogTitle: Pinjarra Hills vs Pinkenba: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pinjarra Hills and Pinkenba.
heading: Pinjarra Hills vs Pinkenba — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pinjarra Hills, Queensland and Pinkenba, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pinjarra Hills has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Pinkenba (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pinjarra Hills or Pinkenba safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pinjarra Hills has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Pinkenba scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pinjarra Hills scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Pinkenba scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pinjarra Hills or Pinkenba?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pinjarra Hills has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
